name: Catfish Florentine with New Orleans Style (Fr
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the catfish in buttermilk and tabasco sauce for 1 hour, refrigerated.
2. Dredge the fish in a mixture of cornmeal, flour, and cajun spice blend. Let rest about 5 minutes. Fry the fish in oil for 2 to 3 minutes per side. Set aside and keep warm.
3. For the sauce, sauté onion in olive oil until soft. Add chopped spinach, lemon juice, worcestershire sauce, black pepper, minced garlic, and white wine. Cover and simmer for 2 to 3 minutes. Serve over fish fillets. Makes 4 servings at approximately 500 calories each (assuming some of the buttermilk and breading is discarded).
